title: Work Item Classification v1
description: Output of pb_classify_work_item_* — assigns a Work item type to an input that does not declare one. Advisory: a low confidence value triggers a human-confirm step rather than auto-routing (ADR-0006, declared-first policy).

_comment.description: Optional human note; ignored by validators.

confidence.description: 0..1 — below the configured threshold, a human confirms before routing.

rationale.description: One-line justification for the chosen type.
